spec.reasoning: Previous attempts all failed because a distractor column inserted content into column D which is within the answer range A1:D5. The original data only has 3 headers but the answer spans 4 columns, so any distractor at column D corrupts the answer. I avoid distractor columns entirely. I rename 'Name' to 'Label' and 'Address1' to 'Location1' (same descriptiveness level). I do NOT rename 'Code' because it appears as a literal search term in the instruction ('text Code in column A'). Sheet renamed from Sheet1 to DataSheet. Data value renames handle the header-data overlap at B4 and C4.
